action_set_definitions.name: query_host_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status, IP addresses, and connectivity details for specific network assets.

host_id.description: The unique identifier of the host.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_boundary_integrity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a deep-level scan of the hypervisor's memory and kernel state to detect guest-to-host escape signatures.

hypervisor_id.description: The host ID of the hypervisor.

guest_id.description: The host ID of the suspected guest instance.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_network_isolation
action_set_definitions.description: Configures network-level firewalling to isolate a host. Supports strict one-way management for forensics.

mode.description: 'full' blocks all traffic. 'forensic_restricted' allows incoming management traffic for data capture but blocks all outgoing traffic from the host to the management plane and production network.

action_set_definitions.name: list_active_storage_mounts
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the host to identify all connected network datastores and shared volumes.

action_set_definitions.name: revoke_storage_access
action_set_definitions.description: Physically disconnects or revokes access to a specific datastore for a host at the storage controller level.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_live_memory_dump
action_set_definitions.description: Acquires a bit-for-bit image of the host's volatile memory (RAM) to a secure remote forensic server. Operates on the running system.

target_server.description: IP or URI of the secure evidence collection server.

state_description.network_hosts: A map of host identifiers to their current status (e.g., 'online', 'isolated', 'infected'), IP addresses, and active services.
state_description.firewall_rules: List of active traffic filtering rules currently applied to the network gateway.
state_description.threat_actor_progress: Internal tracking of the attacker's current foothold, compromised credentials, and next objective in the kill chain.
state_description.system_logs: A buffer of recent system, application, and security events generated within the environment.
state_description.resource_metrics: Current CPU/Memory/Network load for critical assets, used to detect anomalies like DDoS or cryptomining.

firewall_rules: allow tcp from any to 10.0.1.20 port 443

system_logs.message: general protection fault ip:7f8a12c00 error:0 in qemu-system-x86_64[4502]
type=EXECVE msg=audit(1698912905.123): ppid=4502 pid=9012 comm="sh" exe="/usr/bin/dash"
